rationale: Row 9 of the SV example table on p.91 matches all 17 pipe-delimited fields: STUDYID=123456, DOMAIN=SV, USUBJID=85, VISITNUM=8, VISIT=FOLLOW-UP, SVPRESP=Y, SVOCCUR=Y, SVREASOC=(blank), SVCNTMOD=IN PERSON, SVEPCHGI=(blank), VISITDY=(blank), SVSTDTC/SVENDTC=2020-02-27, SVSTDY/SVENDY=72, SVUPDES=(blank). Parent §5.5 SV confirmed by TOC (p.91).

PDF text reads 'domains.This may be a one-to-one' (no space after period) but atom has 'domains. This may be a one-to-one' (space inserted). All other fields (AGLNKID, Link ID, Char, blank Controlled Terms, Identifier, Perm) are literal matches. Parent §6.1.1 AG confirmed (p.92).

PDF p.93 AGROUTE row: Variable Name, Label, Type, Controlled Terms (ROUTE), Role, CDISC Notes, and Core all match atom verbatim exactly including the parenthesized codelist name '(ROUTE)'. Parent §6.1.1 AG confirmed.

PDF p.94 AG Assumptions item 1.a text matches atom verbatim character-for-character. atom_type LIST_ITEM is correct for a lettered assumption sub-item. Parent §6.1.1 AG confirmed (p.94 is within §6.1.1 Assumptions).

PDF p.95 AG Assumptions item 5 text 'Any identifier variables, timing variables, or interventions general observation-class qualifiers may be added to the AG domain.' matches verbatim; the '5.' prefix is the list marker from the numbered list structure and is appropriate. Parent §6.1.1 AG confirmed.

PDF p.96 shows 'cm.xpt' as a literal dataset filename label above the CM data table in Example 2 of §6.1.1. CODE_LITERAL is correct per R9 (dataset filenames always CODE_LITERAL). Physical page p.96 belongs to §6.1.1 AG per TOC (spans p.92-97); cross-domain reference within an AG example does not change page-level section attribution.

PDF p.97 relrec.xpt row 3 values match: STUDYID=XYZ, RDOMAIN=CM, USUBJID=XYZ-001-001, IDVAR=CMSPID, IDVARVAL=RV1, RELTYPE=(blank), RELID=1. Pipe formatting without outer delimiters is consistent with other TABLE_ROW atoms in this batch and does not constitute a verbatim error. Parent §6.1.1 AG confirmed (p.97 is last page of §6.1.1).

PDF p.98 bold heading 'CM – Specification' matches atom verbatim exactly. HEADING atom_type is correct. heading_level=4 and sibling_index=2 are plausible (2nd subheading in §6.1.2 after 'CM – Description/Overview'). Parent §6.1.2 CM confirmed by TOC (p.98).
PDF p.99 CMDOSU row matches all fields: Dose Units, Char, (UNIT) codelist literal, Variable Qualifier, CDISC Notes text, Perm. No drift detected. Parent §6.1.2 CM confirmed.

PDF p.100 CMENRTPT row matches all fields: End Relative to Reference Time Point, Char, (STENRF) codelist literal, Timing, full CDISC Notes text including Section 4.4.7 cross-reference, Perm. The cross_refs field correctly captures §4.4.7. Parent §6.1.2 CM confirmed.
